commands.review_summary:
Adds an early bot-authored ClawSweeper command-status marker filter to `routineGithubActivityReason` and a regression test for marker-backed `issue_comment` edits.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection gives a high-confidence reproduction path: a bot-authored `issue_comment.edited` with ClawSweeper command markers and visible command text is `commandLike` on current main and bypasses the existing routine filters.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] The remaining blocker is contributor-provided real behavior proof or maintainer risk acceptance, not an automated code repair.

target.title: Filter ClawSweeper command status activity
target.body:
Fixes #266.

## Summary

- filter bot-authored ClawSweeper command ack/status/progress comment activity before command-like activity handling
- keep explicit human ClawSweeper commands visible to the activity lane
- add a regression test using the #90328 command-status marker shape

## Real Behavior Proof

Observed on openclaw/openclaw#90328 after the final manual `@clawsweeper re-review`: multiple `ClawSweeper Dispatch` runs were triggered by `issue_comment` events without new pushes or new manual commands, while ClawSweeper labels/rating/status churned. The status comment body contained marker-backed command/status text such as:

```text
<!-- clawsweeper-command-status:90328:re_review:bc62b391bf7 -->
<!-- clawsweeper-command:4643099431:2026-06-07T15:28:02Z:re_review:bc62b391bf7 -->
```

After this patch, `routineGithubActivityReason` treats bot-authored activity containing ClawSweeper command ack/status/progress markers as routine activity before command-like matching, while preserving explicit human command handling.

Focused regression output:

```text
TAP version 13
# Subtest: routineGithubActivityReason keeps explicit ClawSweeper commands visible
ok 1 - routineGithubActivityReason keeps explicit ClawSweeper commands visible
# Subtest: routineGithubActivityReason filters ClawSweeper command status comment edits
ok 2 - routineGithubActivityReason filters ClawSweeper command status comment edits
1..2
# tests 2
# pass 2
# fail 0
```

## Validation

- `pnpm exec oxfmt --check src/repair/notify-github-activity.ts test/repair/notify-github-activity.test.ts`
- `pnpm run build:repair`
- `node --test --test-name-pattern='routineGithubActivityReason (keeps explicit ClawSweeper commands visible|filters ClawSweeper command status comment edits)' test/repair/notify-github-activity.test.ts`
- `pnpm run lint:repair -- src/repair/notify-github-activity.ts`

Note: local machine ran Node 22.22.0 while this repo declares `node >=24`; targeted build/lint/focused tests passed, but full test runs should be trusted to CI on the supported Node version.
target.author: ooiuuii
